name: foundry-review
description: Generic, infrastructure-agnostic skills for reviewing Foundry sites.

interface.shortDescription: Review a Foundry site's rendered pages against source
interface.longDescription: Generic skills for reviewing any Foundry site: check that each source is captured and rendered faithfully for both humans and agents — clean markup, working links, surfaced metadata — without assuming a particular site's infrastructure.
defaultPrompt: Review the content pages changed on this branch for render fidelity.
Check this rendered page against its source note.
Does the rendered site surface the metadata each source declares?
